MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OSWALDO GALICIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND PERMIT FILING OF ANSWER. Appearances: Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq. Law Offices of Michael Brooks Carroll, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Michael Raifsnider, Esq. making a special appearance for Defendant Oswaldo Galicia (in Pro Per litigant), and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Defendant to pay plaintiff's counsel attorney fees in the amount of $1,000.00 CCP section 473(c)(1)(a). The Court adds: the $1,000 in attorneys fees are due one year of the date of the Order signed this day, no interest accruing. Notwithstanding the entry of any other order, ruling judgment or other relief in this action. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR #6812
